{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/262839898?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/bugbunny-research", "id": 262839898, "login": "bugbunny-research", "node_id": "U_kgDOD6qeWg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/bugbunny-research", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46554", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Summary
Deleted API tokens continued to authenticate requests until their cache entry expired, because the auth cache was not invalidated by token value at deletion time.

### Details
The API token deletion path removed the database row but did not evict the token-value keyed entry from the auth cache. The auth middleware therefore continued to accept the deleted token until the cache entry aged out, leaving a deletion-to-revocation window of up to three days.

### Impact
Tokens revoked through the UI or API continued to grant access during the cache TTL, breaking the operator's expected security guarantee that deletion is immediate.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@bugbunny-research](https://github.com/bugbunny-research).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00197, "percentile": 0.09555}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T20:39:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46554"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T20:39:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Stale Auth Cache After API Token Deletion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T20:39:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f76x-f9vj-92jv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: NocoDB: Stale Auth Cache After API Token Deletion
